title: Donald Trump outlines devastating response if Iran assassinates him; ‘there will be nothing left’
summary_full: After joint US–Israeli strikes reportedly killed Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, President Donald Trump issued stark warnings that any attempt on his life would result in Iran being “wiped off the face of the earth.” As retaliation fears mount, his threats of total destruction have intensified concerns over escalation and presidential security.
